particulars.description: As continuing security for payment and discharge of the. Secured liabilities, with full guarantee charges to the. Beneficiary by way of a first fixed charge: all properties acquired by a charging company in the future, all present and future interests of a charging company not effectively mortgaged or charged under the this instrument in or over, freehold or leasehold property, all contracts, licences and rights relating to each property, consents and authorisations, all goodwill, all uncalled capital, all equipment, all intellectual property, all book debts, all the investments, all monies from time to time standing to the credit of its accounts with any bank or financial. Institution, all rights in respect of each insurance policy. And all rights in respect of all other agreements. For more information please refer to the instrument.

As continuing security for payment and discharge of the secured liabilities, with full guarantee charges to the beneficiary by way of a first fixed charge: all properties acquired by a charging company in the future, all present and future interests of a charging company not effectively mortgaged or charged under the this instrument in or over, freehold or leasehold property, all contracts, licences and rights relating to each property, consents and authorisations, all goodwill, all intellectual property, all uncalled capital, all equipment, all intellectual property, all book debts, all the investments, all monies from time to time standing to the credit of its accounts with any bank or financial institution, all rights in respect of each insurance policy and all rights in respect of all other agreements. For more information please refer to the instrument.
Contains fixed charge. Contains floating charge covers all the property or undertaking of the company. Contains negative pledge.
